name: Fireworks AI

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: US infrastructure only. No EU region generally available.

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: ZDR by default for all open models — prompt/generation data in volatile memory only, deleted after request. Response API: 30-day retention when store=true (opt-out: store=false). FireOptimizer: opt-in logging only.
dataUsage.details: No training on customer inference data. ZDR is the default for open model endpoints.

notes: Headquartered in San Francisco, CA. SCCs explicitly referenced for EEA/UK transfers. Named EU GDPR representative via GDPR Local (fireworksaiinc.gdprlocal.com/eu). ZDR is the default for inference — better data hygiene posture than many US competitors. No EU data residency option.
